subject: Re: ██
body: Ok, let her apply for a visa at the consulate the normal way. Once applied sent me a copy of the submission receipt and the application form, so I can do the necessary through my contact in Morocco.
body_html: Ok, let her apply for a visa at the consulate the normal way. Once applied sent me a copy of the submission receipt and the application form, so I can do the necessary through my contact in Morocco.

subject: Re: ██
body: I have sent the passport copy to my contact who will talk with the Moroccan consulate today morning and will advise me. If not today, then it will be on Monday. I'll let you know. I can see you anytime after 3pm.
body_html: I have sent the passport copy to my contact who will talk with the Moroccan consulate today morning and will advise me. If not today, then it will be on Monday. I'll let you know. I can see you anytime after 3pm.

subject: Re: ██
body: do you know if █████ can go to morrocan consulate for visa today. ? do i see you before i leave?
